revision.text:
{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: documented usage, added fw1 and fw2 optional parameters; changed ta2 default to "left"
revision.text:
{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") '''Note''': If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: add display:none for the time being
revision.text:
{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: increase the navframe number from 2 to 3. Whilst this seems silly - it seems to be needed to ensure it starts hidden and displays [show] instead of [hide] due to some CSS conflict
revision.text:
{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
{{/doc}}

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
{{/doc}}

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
{{/doc}}

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
{{/doc}}

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: add a nbsp so that code used in the content section can involve an immediate bullet, or other code
revision.text:
{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}
 {{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
{{documentation}}

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: seems collapsible tables are more reliable than navframe
rv - breaks in unusual and interesting ways :D also add tracking category

revision.comment: revert changes due to not working with IE - see http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Village_pump_%28technical%29#Cursor_problem_with_.22Hidden.22_template & http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/User_talk:Pdfpdf#.22Hidden.22_not_working.3F

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Hidden: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only administrators] (indefinite))
revision.text:
{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}
{{{content|{{{contents|{{{2}}}}}}}}}

revision.comment: rewrote as a frontend for hidden begin/hidden end (tested in sandbox); which will help keep two in sync and allow use of toggle here :)
add optional multiline=y for multiline titles
add optional multiline=y for multiline titles
rm none, upstream is granular enough not to need this
1 revision imported: re-importing these templates since they seem to have broken
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: documented usage, added fw1 and fw2 optional parameters; changed ta2 default to "left"
revision.text:
{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") '''Note''': If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: increase the navframe number from 2 to 3. Whilst this seems silly - it seems to be needed to ensure it starts hidden and displays [show] instead of [hide] due to some CSS conflict

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}

revision.text:
{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}}
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: documented usage, added fw1 and fw2 optional parameters; changed ta2 default to "left"
revision.text:
{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") '''Note''': If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{1}}} 
{{{2}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: add display:none for the time being
revision.text:
{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: increase the navframe number from 2 to 3. Whilst this seems silly - it seems to be needed to ensure it starts hidden and displays [show] instead of [hide] due to some CSS conflict
revision.text:
{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
==Usage== This template displays the first parameter (the heading) with a [Show] link on the right. If [Show] is clicked by the user, the second parameter (the body) is also displayed. The following parameters are also available: ;fw1 :the font-weight for the heading (default "bold") ;fw2 :the font-weight for the body (default "normal") ;bg1 :the background-color for the heading (default "transparent") ;bg2 :the background-color for the body (default "transparent") ;ta1 :the text-align for the heading (default "center") ;ta2 :the text-align for the body (default "left") Note: If the user has specified "justify paragraphs" in preferences, this template will not respect that. [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}} 
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}

revision.comment: add a nbsp so that code used in the content section can involve an immediate bullet, or other code
revision.text:
{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}
 {{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
{{documentation}}

{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}
{{{content|{{{2}}}}}}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: seems collapsible tables are more reliable than navframe
rv - breaks in unusual and interesting ways :D also add tracking category

revision.comment: rewrote as a frontend for hidden begin/hidden end (tested in sandbox); which will help keep two in sync and allow use of toggle here :)
add optional multiline=y for multiline titles
add optional multiline=y for multiline titles
rm none, upstream is granular enough not to need this
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hidden here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{hidden begin|toggle={{{showhide|}}}{{{toggle|}}}|expanded={{{expand|{{{expanded|}}}}}}|class={{{class|}}}|border={{{border|}}}|style={{{framestyle|{{{style|{{{css|}}}}}}}}} |titlebgcolor={{{titlebgcolor|{{{background|{{{bg1|}}}}}}}}}|ta1={{{titlealign|{{{ta1|center}}}}}}|titlestyle={{safesubst:#if:{{{multiline|{{{multi-line|}}}}}}|height:auto;}}{{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{fw1|bold}}}|bold||font-weight:{{{fw1|bold}}};}}{{{headercss|{{{headerstyle|{{{titlestyle|}}}}}}}}} |title={{safesubst:#if:{{{multiline|{{{multi-line|}}}}}}|
{{{title|{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}}}}
|{{{title|{{{header|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}} |contentbgcolor={{{contentbgcolor|{{{bg2|}}}}}}|ta2={{{ta2|}}}|contentstyle={{safesubst:#ifeq:{{{fw2|normal}}}|normal||font-weight:{{{fw2|normal}}};}}{{{contentcss|{{{contentstyle|}}}}}} }} {{{content|{{{contents|{{{text|{{{2}}}}}}}}}}}}{{hidden end}}{{safesubst:#if:{{{background|}}}{{{bg1|}}}{{{bg2|}}}{{{titlealign|}}}{{{ta1|}}}{{{ta2|}}}{{{fw1|}}}{{{fw2|}}}|}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Hidden templates using styles|{{NAMESPACE}}{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
